root_cause: M2 computed roots from Z-scored feature vectors, not raw polynomial coefficients. Z-scoring artificially regularizes the spacing distribution toward GUE-like variance.
killer_finding: Random polynomials are CLOSER to GUE than real knots. Knot structure introduces EXCESS CLUSTERING (P(s<0.1)=0.34 vs GUE 0.004). Knots are ANTI-GUE.
F38_candidate: Raw-data verification: distributional claims must be verified on raw data, not preprocessed features. Preprocessing can create or destroy distributional properties.
kill_tally: 12/14 killed. TT-Cross Megethos-zeroed bonds remain the only surviving signal.
